message:
fix(web): port full touch/zoom/perf features from Cloudflare demo

Syncs /web/index.html with frankentui_showcase_demo.html, adding:
- Touch state machine (pinch-to-zoom, scroll, tap detection)
- On-screen zoom buttons for touch devices (+/-/1:1)
- Loading overlay with animated progress bar
- Zero-copy WASM patch path (reads directly from WASM memory)
- URL parameters (?cols, ?rows, ?screen, ?zoom, ?jsonl)
- Auto-zoom on narrow touch devices
- Zoom persistence (localStorage + URL)
- Keyboard zoom (Ctrl/Cmd +/-/0)
- Mouse drag tracking with button state
- 100dvh CSS for mobile Safari
- visualViewport/orientationchange handlers
- LOG_JSONL off by default (was spamming console at 60fps)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
